label: Taoist, Daoist, lingzhi/reishi mushroom, immortality, alchemy, materia medica, and esoteric Asian art from open university and museum collections
notes: Covers Taoist/Daoist deity and immortal imagery, lingzhi and sacred fungus motifs, Chinese materia medica and herbal botanical illustrations, Taoist inner and outer alchemy diagrams, ritual talismans, immortality herbs, mountain hermits, Shennong, the Eight Immortals, Lu Dongbin, Zhong Kui, and Daoist priest imagery. Sources prefer Wikimedia Commons (including Wellcome Collection, British Museum, Rijksmuseum, and university digital collection uploads), Gallica/BnF, Heidelberg University, Cambridge, Oxford, SOAS, Leiden, and open Asian university collections. Date cutoff is <= 1956. Items with no date metadata are admitted only when the title, artist, query, or source context contains a Taoist, immortality, botanical, or historical Asian keyword. Captions do not assert medical efficacy, psychedelic properties, or occult certainty unless the source metadata explicitly states it.
